title: Type-safe Full-stack App with tRPC + Drizzle
description: Complete route for a type-safe full-stack Next.js app: Drizzle ORM for the database layer, tRPC for end-to-end type-safe APIs, Clerk for auth, shadcn for UI, Zod for validation, and tested CI/CD to Vercel.

steps.description: Bootstrap the Next.js App Router project with TypeScript
Add Tailwind CSS v4 for utility-first styling
Install shadcn/ui component library for pre-built UI components
Set up Drizzle ORM with Postgres — define schema, run migrations
Add tRPC for end-to-end type-safe API procedures (no REST, no codegen)
Add Clerk for authentication — protect tRPC procedures and pages
Add Zod for input validation on tRPC procedures and forms
Set up Vitest for unit-testing tRPC procedures and utility functions
Configure CI pipeline — type-check, lint, test on every PR
Deploy to production on Vercel with environment variables
